title: Operator-based centrality in citation graphs
abstract: This paper studies algebraic operators, PageRank, HITS, and matrix functions in citation graphs.

title: Bibliographic coupling and co-citation for literature mapping
abstract: We compare bibliographic coupling and co-citation for topic detection and field mapping.

title: Temporal ranking in evolving scholarly networks
abstract: The article introduces age-aware random walks and temporal centrality in growing citation networks.

title: Multi-view similarity for scientific papers
abstract: We combine structure, text, and time into a single similarity score for paper retrieval.

title: Scientific document embeddings with citation signal
abstract: This paper learns scientific text embeddings using citation relations and title abstract pairs.

title: Author similarity from publication sets
abstract: We define author similarity by aggregating similarities across pairs of publications.

title: Heterogeneous academic graphs with papers authors and venues
abstract: A heterogeneous graph connects papers, authors, venues, and institutions for scholarly mining.

title: Researcher recommendation with graph and text features
abstract: This paper recommends collaborators using graph structure and profile text together.
